data.title: Cryptocurrency market cap surpasses $4.21T, Bitcoin hits $124,000 with US demand, Fed policy changes boosting Q4 investor optimism.
data.description: The value of Bitcoin surged to nearly $124,000 driven by increasing demand in the US, changes in Federal Reserve policy, and positive expectations for a strong fourth quarter. Investors were buoyed by these factors, leading to a significant rally in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: AI-driven Credo Tech tops 10 stocks on IBD's best lists; includes IBD 50, IPO Leaders with growth potential.
data.description: Discover which high-performing stocks such as Credo Technology have recently secured a place in Investor's Business Daily's compilation of top growth stocks. The latest addition of AI company Credo Tech and other promising companies onto the prestigious IBD 50 and IPO Leaders lists signals noteworthy growth potential. Stay updated on the latest stock market trends and investments by exploring these new entrants on IBD's recommended stock lists.

data.title: The Treasury plans to create a commemorative $1 coin featuring Trump.
data.description: In recent developments, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.8%, marking a decrease of 0.3% from the previous month. This change represents a total of 500,000 new jobs added to the economy. Additionally, the GDP growth rate for the quarter has been revised to 6.2%, which is a significant increase from the previous estimate. These positive indicators suggest a strengthening of the economy and job market in the current scenario.

data.title: IEQ Capital opens new office at 525 Market St, San Francisco, making it the third Bay Area location.
data.description: On October 3, 2025, IEQ Capital revealed the inauguration of a new branch at 525 Market Street in San Francisco, CA, becoming their third office in the Bay Area. This development supplements IEQ's main office in Foster City and the debut of another office in the region.

data.title: King Copper Discovery Corp. finds new high priority targets at Colquemayo Project in Peru, showing progress.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, a press release dated October 3, 2025, announced that King Copper Discovery Corp. is providing updates on the developments at its Colquemayo Project in Peru. The company, identified as King Copper with tickers KCP-TSXV, TBXXF-OTCQB, 3RI-FSE, highlighted the ongoing advancements at the site.
